name: WebGL Shader Art
description: Generative shader art using WebGL fragment shaders: raymarching, fractals, noise fields, domain repetition, and color grading. Targets raw WebGL2 or Three.js ShaderMaterial fullscreen quad.

requiredElements.name: fullscreen-quad
requiredElements.description: Fullscreen triangle/quad rendering the fragment shader as a post-process.

requiredElements.name: fragment-shader
requiredElements.description: Main fragment shader with UV, time uniform, and complex procedural output.

requiredElements.name: uniform-inputs
requiredElements.description: Time, resolution, and mouse uniforms for interactivity.

requiredElements.name: color-grading
requiredElements.description: Color palette function or tone mapping for aesthetic output.

requiredElements.name: resize-handling
requiredElements.description: Canvas resize updates resolution uniform and viewport.

optionalElements.name: raymarching
optionalElements.description: SDF raymarching for 3D scenes within the fragment shader.

optionalElements.name: audio-reactive
optionalElements.description: Audio frequency data fed as uniform for music-reactive visuals.

optionalElements.name: post-bloom
optionalElements.description: Bloom post-pass for glow on bright shader regions.

optionalElements.name: interactive-camera
optionalElements.description: Mouse controls camera/ray origin for scene exploration.

qualityRules.description: Output is visually striking — complex patterns, depth, color harmony.
Shader is not a trivial copy — has unique procedural elements.
Color palette is deliberate — gradient, contrast, tonemapping applied.
Animation is smooth and continuous with time uniform; no popping.
Shader compiles fast; no excessive loops; framerate at 60fps on mid GPU.
Fragment shader declares precision qualifiers; no implicit float/int.
GLSL braces balanced; shader compiles without errors.
Resize updates resolution uniform — no stretch/distortion.

antiPatterns.description: Fragment shader missing precision qualifier — renders differently across GPUs.
Mixing int and float literals (1 vs 1.0) — GLSL strict mode errors.
No resize handling — shader stretches when window resizes.
Shader is just a UV-to-color gradient with no complexity — not 'art'.

improvementSuggestions.description: Add FBM noise layers for organic texture detail.
Replace 2D with SDF raymarching for 3D depth.
Use cosine palette function for harmonious color grading.

exampleOutputs.label: Fullscreen quad shader setup
